ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] ### Response: Ah, my dear traveler! I've seen many like you in a rush before and understand your plight all too well. The rain has indeed delayed our caravans as it often does when we venture northward—I recall two healing potion vials left over from last season’s shortage, which are now the only ones I have to offer at this bazaar under my humble stall sign.<TAB>5
